examples: In gentle tones, the minister of education advised me on how to talk with the smallest ones about what recently befell us.
Modern woman has been freed from many of the duties that befell her sisters in times past.
One day a good fortune befell him.
Cellphone distraction may have played a role in a tragedy that befell one Florida family.
Ms Gallmann's animal-conservation crusade grew out of the terrible events that befell her family.
